name: Green Banana Salad (Caribbean)
recipeIngredient: 1 small cucumber, with peel, thinly sliced (1/8")
reserve the juice for salad dressing
8 tablespoons fat-free Southwestern Salad Dressing (see link)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the dressing: Mix 1 tablespoon of fat-free salad dressing per serving with the reserved tomato juice.
2. Heat water in a skillet; add a pinch of salt. Reduce heat and simmer the bananas for about 2 minutes on each side. Drain and cool with cold tap water sprayed gently. Spray lemon juice over the cooled bananas and set aside to air-dry.
3. While drying, chop and slice the cucumber, tomato, celery, carrots, avocado, and serve with seeds or whole wheat dinner roll garnished with sunflower seeds.
Tip: Avoid boiling bananas for too long as they may brown and break apart quickly.
Pantry Option: Use plantains instead of green bananas.
Link: Fat-Free Italian Salad Dressing
Variation: Try Asian soy ginger dressing thinned with seltzer, ginger ale, or fresh orange juice. Add a drop of hot sauce or minced jalapeno for heat.
